---
title: "The Split: Analysing contest design in the Scottish Premier League"
date: 2025-06-06
author: ["Jess Hargreaves", "Johan Rewilak"]
publication: "Proceedings of MathSport International 2025 Conference"
categories: ["Football"]
url_source: https://eprints.whiterose.ac.uk/id/eprint/229626/1/The_SPLit_MathSport.pdf
url_preprint: 
journ: "Proceedings of MathSport International 2025 Conference"
page: 81-86
year: 2025
image: image.png
editor: 'source'
---
